title: veronica austriaca subsp. scheereri
intro: Veronica austriaca subsp. scheereri, also known as the Austrian speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally employed to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and providing relief from respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Veronica austriaca subsp. scheereri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
